risk_findings.title: Machine Account Quota allows regular users to join computers
risk_findings.detail: ms-DS-MachineAccountQuota=10. Any authenticated user can add up to 10 machine account(s) to the domain, enabling Kerberos relay and resource-based constrained delegation attacks.

risk_findings.title: LAPS (Local Administrator Password Solution) is not deployed
risk_findings.detail: Neither ms-Mcs-AdmPwd (legacy LAPS) nor msLAPS-Password (Windows LAPS) schema attributes are present. Local administrator passwords are likely shared across machines, enabling lateral movement after a single compromise.

risk_findings.title: Default password policy has no lockout; fine-grained PSOs may not cover all accounts
risk_findings.detail: lockoutThreshold=0 in the default policy. Accounts without an assigned PSO are unprotected against brute-force attacks.

risk_findings.title: Fine-grained password policies (PSOs) are configured
risk_findings.detail: 1 PSO(s) found. Review applies_to targets to ensure privileged accounts receive the strictest policy.
